name: Garlic Coeurs a La Creme
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Cheese (fresh, white goat cheese or Cream Cheese)
1 each Purée from 2 heads of Roasted Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Use either fresh, white goat cheese (Motrachet or Boucheron) scraped off the wood ash coating or Cream Cheese.
2. Mix the cottage cheese through a sieve into a mixing bowl.
3. Beat the goat cheese and garlic purée into the cottage cheese using a wooden spoon or electric mixer.
4. Add yogurt to the mixture.
5. Line 8 crepe molds with damp cheesecloth, allowing an overhang.
6. Spoon the mixture into the molds, wrap them, and place on a rack over a deep plate.
7. Refrigerate overnight to drain.
8. Unwrap and unmold onto 8 small plates.
9. Discard the cheesecloth.
10. Serve with thin brown bread, toast, or bagels and slices of smoked salmon, if desired.
Savory Creme:
1. If you lack crepe molds, spoon the mixture into a cheesecloth-lined colander.
2. Refrigerate overnight to drain.
3. Unmold onto a serving platter.
4. Each diner can scoop off a portion.
